単語.mnemonics: Imagine a 'tango' dance for words, twirling into your 'vocabulary'.

作文.mnemonics: Picture 'sakura' (cherry blossoms) being composed into a beautiful 'writing'.

試験.mnemonics: Envision 'shiken' (test) warriors examining their skills in an 'exam'.

手紙.mnemonics: Imagine your 'hand' (て) 'paper' (紙) writing a heartfelt 'letter'.

メール.mnemonics: Think of 'mail' electronically zooming through the internet as 'メール'.

ギター.mnemonics: Picture a 'guitar' gently weeping, its strings echoing 'ギター' sounds.

ピアノ.mnemonics: Piano sounds like 'piano', so it's easy to remember.

歌舞伎.mnemonics: Envision 'Kabuki' actors with faces as vivid and dramatic as the characters they portray.

スキー.mnemonics: Picture 'skiing' down snowy slopes, feeling the 'スキー' rush of cold air.

お弁当.mnemonics: Imagine opening a 'bento' box to reveal a delicious 'boxed lunch' adventure.

ピザ.mnemonics: Think of 'pizza' slices as 'ピザ' pieces of a delicious pie chart.

病気.mnemonics: Visualize 'sickness' as a '病気' dragon, to be defeated with rest and care.

薬.mnemonics: Imagine 'medicine' as a '薬' key unlocking the door to health.

いい子.mnemonics: Picture a 'good child' shining brightly, embodying the 'いい子' ideal.

色.mnemonics: Envision the world in '色' (color), painting life's canvas with vibrant 'colors'.

今度.mnemonics: Think of '今度' as a promise, a 'next time' filled with opportunities.

先月.mnemonics: Imagine 'last month' as a '先月' boat sailing away into the past.

去年.mnemonics: Visualize 'last year' as a '去年' door closing, with memories stored behind it.

青い.mnemonics: Picture the 'blue' sky, vast and endless, as '青い' freedom.

赤い.mnemonics: Imagine 'red' as the '赤い' passion of a blooming rose.

黒い.mnemonics: Think of 'black' as the '黒い' night, mysterious and deep.

白い.mnemonics: Envision 'white' as the '白い' purity of freshly fallen snow.

寂しい.mnemonics: Picture 'loneliness' as a '寂しい' single leaf drifting on a silent lake.

若い.mnemonics: Imagine 'young' as the '若い' spring, full of life and new beginnings.

意地悪.mnemonics: Think of someone 'mean' as having an '意地悪' twisted smile, hiding their true intent.

踊る.mnemonics: Picture yourself 'dancing' with joy, feet moving as if '踊る' on clouds.

終わる.mnemonics: Imagine a book 'ending', its '終わる' last page gently closing on the story.

薬を飲む.mnemonics: Visualize 'taking medicine' as swallowing a '薬を飲む' key to unlock health.

人気がある.mnemonics: Think of 'being popular' as having a '人気がある' aura that attracts people like a magnet.

始まる.mnemonics: Envision 'beginning' a journey, the '始まる' road stretching out invitingly ahead.

english: to play (a string instrument or piano)
弾く.mnemonics: Picture 'playing' an instrument, your fingers 'ひく' dancing across the strings or keys.

もらう.mnemonics: Imagine 'receiving' a gift, the 'もらう' joy of unwrapping a surprise.

覚える.mnemonics: Think of 'memorizing' as planting '覚える' seeds in the garden of your mind.

出る.mnemonics: Visualize 'exiting' a door, stepping '出る' out into a new adventure.

運動する.mnemonics: Picture 'exercising' as '運動する' energy flowing through your body, revitalizing you.

散歩する.mnemonics: Imagine 'taking a walk' as '散歩する' wandering through a storybook landscape.

そう.mnemonics: Think of 'そう' as nodding in agreement, seeing things 'that way'.

～から.mnemonics: Picture 'から' as the starting point of a journey or reason, the 'from' or 'because' of a story.

～まで.mnemonics: Imagine 'まで' as the finish line, the 'until' or 'to' point of arrival.

是非.mnemonics: Think of '是非' as an enthusiastic nod, 'certainly' going forward 'by all means'.

ところで.mnemonics: Picture 'ところで' as a casual turn in conversation, a 'by the way' moment of insight.

みんな.mnemonics: Envision 'everyone' gathered together, 'みんな' forming a circle of unity.

もう.mnemonics: Think of 'もう' as reaching a point, 'already' there or wanting 'more'.

一つ.mnemonics: Imagine 'one thing' as a '一つ' solitary star shining in the sky.

二つ.mnemonics: Picture 'two things' as '二つ' companions journeying side by side.

三つ.mnemonics: Envision 'three things' as a '三つ' tripod, stable and balanced.

四つ.mnemonics: Think of 'four things' as '四つ' corners of a square, solid and secure.

五つ.mnemonics: Imagine 'five things' as '五つ' fingers on a hand, each one unique.

六つ.mnemonics: Picture 'six things' as '六つ' seeds, ready to grow into something more.

七つ.mnemonics: Visualize 'seven things' as '七つ' colors of the rainbow, vibrant and full of life.

八つ.mnemonics: Think of 'eight things' as '八つ' octopus legs, each moving with purpose.

九つ.mnemonics: Imagine 'nine things' as '九つ' planets orbiting in the solar system.

十.mnemonics: Envision 'ten' as '十' perfect score, a complete set united.
